shortDescription.en: The foundation of Ethiopian cuisine — sun-dried red chilies, garlic, ginger, and warming spices.
shortDescription.am: የኢትዮጵያ ምግብ መሠረት — በፀሐይ የደረቁ ቀይ ቃሪያ፣ ሽንኩርት፣ ዝንጅብል እና ሞቅ ባሉ ቅመሞች።

description.en: A robust, complex, and fiery blend of sun-dried red chilies, garlic, ginger, basil, korarima, rue, ajwain or radhuni, nigella, and fenugreek.

ingredients.en: Chili peppers, garlic, ginger, basil, korarima, rue, ajwain, nigella, and fenugreek. All 100% natural and sun-dried.

shortDescription.en: Chickpea and spice blend for silky shiro wat — a comforting staple.
shortDescription.am: ለልዩ ሽሮ ወጥ የአክሊል እና ቅመም ቅልቅል።

description.en: Ground chickpeas with garlic, ginger, and berbere-forward spice notes — perfect for quick, nourishing meals.
description.am: የተፈጨ አክሊል ከነጭ ሽንኩርት፣ ዝንጅብል እና በርበሬ ጣዕም ጋር።

ingredients.en: Chickpea flour, spices, garlic, ginger. Natural ingredients.

culinary.en: Prepare shiro wat with onions and oil; serve with injera.
culinary.am: ከሽንኩርት እና ዘይት ሽሮ ወጥ ያዘጋጁ፤ ከእንጀራ ጋር ያገልግሉ።

shipping.en: Ships securely packaged. Local delivery 1–2 days.

shortDescription.en: Ethiopian cardamom — fragrant seeds for coffee, stews, and baking.
shortDescription.am: የኢትዮጵያ ኮረሪማ — ለቡና፣ ወጥ እና ምግብ።

description.en: Whole korarima pods with a citrus-floral aroma prized in Ethiopian kitchens.

culinary.en: Crush into coffee; add to doro wat and spiced butter.
culinary.am: ለቡና፣ ለዶሮ ወጥ እና ለተቀመመ ቅቤ።

shipping.en: Ships securely packaged. Local delivery 1–2 days.

shortDescription.en: House blend of warm spices for everyday Ethiopian cooking.

description.en: A balanced jarred blend crafted for depth and aroma in soups and sautés.

ingredients.en: Proprietary blend of sun-dried spices. All natural.

shortDescription.en: Traditional blend for rich, aromatic sauces.

description.en: Signature blend honoring regional recipes — warmth without overpowering heat.

ingredients.en: Natural spice blend. Details on jar label.

shipping.en: Ships securely packaged. Local delivery 1–2 days.

shortDescription.en: Handy tools for prepping injera, spices, and everyday cooking.
shortDescription.am: ለእንጀራ፣ ቅመም እና ምግብ የሚያገለግሉ እቃዎች።

description.en: Curated kitchen essentials selected for durability and daily use.

ingredients.en: Kitchen utensils and accessories (see product images).

culinary.en: Use alongside Shegye spices for a complete table.

shipping.en: Ships securely packaged. Local delivery 1–2 days.
